landing.heroDescription: Collect testimonials with a simple link. Display them anywhere with a beautiful embed widget. Automate the whole thing with email campaigns.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free forever plan available.
landing.step1Desc: Build a testimonial collection form in seconds. Share the link with customers.
landing.step2Desc: Customers submit text, ratings, and video testimonials through your branded form.
landing.step3Desc: Embed a beautiful widget on your site. Copy-paste one line of code.
landing.seeWhatUsersSay: See what our users are saying
landing.shareableLinksDesc: Create branded forms and share a simple link. No login required for reviewers.
landing.embeddableWidgetsDesc: Carousel, wall, or badge. Copy one line of code to display on any website.
landing.videoTestimonialsDesc: Let customers record video testimonials directly from your collection form.
landing.emailCampaignsDesc: Automatically request testimonials after purchase or project completion.
landing.approveManageDesc: Review, approve, tag, and feature your best testimonials from one dashboard.
landing.customBrandingDesc: Match your brand colors, add your logo, remove ProofPulse branding on paid plans.
landing.startFreeUpgrade: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
landing.readyToConvert: Ready to turn testimonials into conversions?
landing.joinThousands: Join thousands of businesses using ProofPulse to showcase their social proof.
landing.faq1A: ProofPulse is a platform that helps businesses collect, manage, and display customer testimonials through shareable links and embeddable widgets.
landing.faq2A: Yes! Our free plan includes up to 10 testimonials, 1 form, and 1 widget. Upgrade when you need more.
landing.faq3Q: How do I embed the widget on my website?
landing.faq3A: Copy the generated embed code (one line of JavaScript) and paste it on your website. The widget renders automatically.
landing.faq4A: Absolutely! On paid plans you can customize colors, remove ProofPulse branding, and use your own logo.
landing.faq5A: We use Stripe for secure payments. All major credit and debit cards are accepted.
landing.demo1Content: ProofPulse made it so easy to collect testimonials from our clients. We saw a 23% increase in conversions after adding the widget to our landing page.
landing.demo2Content: I used to manually ask for reviews via email. Now I just send a ProofPulse link and testimonials roll in. The embed widget looks amazing on my portfolio.
landing.demo3Content: The automated email campaigns are a game-changer. After each course completion, students get a request and I get authentic testimonials without lifting a finger.
landing.why1Desc: Create your first collection form in under 2 minutes. No technical knowledge required. Just share the link and watch testimonials come in.
landing.why2Desc: Our embed widget works on WordPress, Shopify, Squarespace, Wix, custom sites — anywhere you can paste a line of code.
landing.why3Desc: Businesses using social proof see up to 3x higher conversion rates. Display authentic customer voices where they matter most.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

dashboard.noTestimonialsYet: No testimonials yet. Create a collection form to get started.

testimonials.descriptionPlaceholder: Instructions or context for the reviewer
testimonials.noFormsDesc: Create a collection form and share the link with your customers to start collecting testimonials.

widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.subtitle: Create embeddable widgets for your website
widgets.noWidgetsDesc: Create a widget to display your testimonials on any website with a simple embed code.
widgets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this widget? This cannot be undone.
widgets.configureDisplay: Configure how your testimonials will be displayed

campaigns.title: Email Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Request testimonials via automated emails
campaigns.emailBodyDefault: We'd love to hear about your experience! Please take a moment to share your feedback.
campaigns.emailBodyHint: A "Share Your Testimonial" button will be added automatically.
campaigns.recipientEmailsPlaceholder:
one@example.com, two@example.com
Or one email per line
campaigns.recipientEmailsHint: Separate emails with commas or new lines.
campaigns.needFormFirst: You need to create a collection form first before you can send a campaign.
campaigns.noCampaignsDesc: Create an email campaign to automatically request testimonials from your customers.
campaigns.subject: Subject:
campaigns.sendConfirm: Send this campaign now? Emails will be sent to all recipients immediately.
campaigns.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this campaign? This cannot be undone.
campaigns.atLeastOneEmail: Please add at least one recipient email.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. All your data will be permanently removed.

seo.title: ProofPulse — Collect & Display Customer Testimonials | Social Proof Platform
seo.description: Collect customer testimonials with shareable links. Display them on your website with beautiful embed widgets. Automate requests with email campaigns. Free to start.
